caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Cozumel Today
caribbean.paragraph: Cozumel is experiencing sustained winds of 14 kt with wave heights reaching 3.4 feet and a dominant swell from the SSE at an 8-second period. Rain probability is 100%, indicating persistent heavy rainfall throughout the day while Martinique sees similar 14 kt winds but less impactful marine conditions.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain Hits Venice With Calm Winds and Low Seas
mediterranean.paragraph: Venice is experiencing heavy rain with a 75% rain probability while winds remain calm at 0 kt and wave heights stay low at 2.1 ft. The dominant swell is coming from the east with a 4-second period, creating stable but wet conditions across the Central Mediterranean.
